headline: Woman Organizes Her Bookshelf By Color, Now Can't Find Anything, Calls It 'Curated Chaos'
summary: 'It's aesthetic,' Amanda said. 'It's also completely useless,' her friend said. 'But it's pretty.'
fullBody: Amanda organized her bookshelf by color. 'It's beautiful,' Amanda said. 'It's also impossible to find anything,' her friend said. 'I don't need to find things,' Amanda said. 'I need to enjoy the aesthetic.' Her bookshelf now has 47 books organized by hue. 'I think I have a book about philosophy in the red section,' Amanda said. 'But I'm not sure.' The bookshelf is beautiful. It is also chaos.
